name: protein-design-mcp
description: Protein design pipeline: RFdiffusion backbone generation, ProteinMPNN sequence design, AlphaFold3 structure validation
skillInstructions: Prioritize using MCP tools to invoke protein design software. All compute tasks must use submit_job for async execution and query_job for polling. Always call get_tool_info before invoking any tool. Never manually construct command lines when MCP tools are available. For long-running batch validation tasks, use scheduling features (CronCreate or equivalent) to check progress periodically rather than blocking the session with continuous polling.
